---
title: "Ebony Eberz"
categories: "K. Pfau"
image: 20251111_P_Eberz_Ebony_RM_0881.webp
about:
  template: trestles
---

Ebony Eberz joined our group to work on a project about Pseudoxanthoma elasticum (PXE) in young patients (≤40 years). This project will serve as the basis for her doctoral degree (Dr. med.).

## Education

University of Bonn | Bonn, Germany
Medical Degree (MD) | ongoing
